meta.title: Solutions | SGS
meta.description: Technical SGS solutions across solar and renewable systems, utility infrastructure, water treatment, wastewater, desalination, and industrial support.

hero.title: Integrated infrastructure solutions
hero.text: Technical and advisory pathways for renewable energy, water, and utility performance.

solutions.title: Clean power systems built for real market conditions
solutions.text: SGS supports photovoltaic, utility-scale solar, and broader renewable system planning with a consulting-first lens.

solutions.title: Integrated project support for complex infrastructure delivery
solutions.text: Energy, engineering, procurement, and implementation planning aligned inside one framework.

solutions.title: Utility systems that support resilience and resource quality
solutions.text: Treatment and purification pathways for industrial, municipal, and specialized use cases.

solutions.title: Recycling and treatment strategies with operational practicality
solutions.text: Support for wastewater treatment, recovery, sludge handling, and related infrastructure planning.

solutions.title: High-value water security solutions for demanding environments
solutions.text: RO, desalination, and water production planning supported by technical coordination and sourcing insight.

solutions.title: Technical support where utility performance and industrial delivery meet
solutions.text: SGS helps connect specialized technology, procurement, and stakeholder coordination in active industrial programs.
